discover.title: Discover new words
discover.subtitle: Expand your vocabulary step by step
discover.body: Learn new words daily and memorize them through practice and repetition.

progress.title: Track your progress
progress.subtitle: See how far you've come
progress.body: Follow your learning process, improve your skills and reach new levels.

practice.title: Start practicing
practice.subtitle: Practice makes perfect
practice.body: Complete exercises, earn points and master the language step by step.

title_for_delete_account: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
body_for_delete_account: After deleting the account, all data will be lost and there will be no possibility to restore it
body_for_log_out: After logging out, all data will be lost
title_for_log_out: Are you sure you want to log out?
level_locked_message: The previous level was not passed with the required score (75+).
level_max_score_message: This level has been completed to the maximum (100 points).
streak_subtitle_5: Every day brings you closer to your goal
streak_body_1: Keep up the good work, you're making progress!
streak_body_2: Consistency is the key to mastering any language.
streak_body_3: Your brain will thank you for the workout.
streak_body_4: A little more practice and you'll be speaking like a pro.
streak_body_5: Don't miss days to keep your progress!
heart_dialog_title: My heart will be full again soon
push_for_like: Press ♡ on the card to save
notification_page_body: If anything new happens, you will find out here

error.password_must_one_digit: Password must contain at least one digit
error.error_yes_account: Account with this number already exists

tips.tip_1: Water is water. Drink more water while learning!
tips.tip_3: Watch movies in English with subtitles.
tips.tip_4: Surround yourself with English: change your phone language.
tips.tip_5: Don't be afraid to make mistakes — it's part of the process.
tips.tip_6: Practice speaking in front of a mirror.
tips.tip_7: Listen to English podcasts while commuting.
